disclosures.note: raw 142 chain B/C/D/E from task spec NOT measured. A4/A7/A8/A11-A15/A16 are source-only (no AOT binary). INTERP path blocked by F-A18-3 (>23s/KB on hexa interp). This sweep measures upper bound across {A1, A17, A18, A17+A18, A18+A17} only — the full-chain federation/structural axes await AOT cohort 2.

95%+ of measured files chose A1+A18(AOT) over A1+A17(AOT). A18 LZ-PPM order-4 strictly outperforms A17 PPM order-3 on JSONL-heavy corpora. A17 surfaces only as A17->A18 chain candidate, but in practice A18-alone is best (A17 then A18 returns same size as A18 alone — try-and-revert reverts back to A18 baseline). The A1+A17(AOT)+A18(AOT) chain in anchor ade9d5eb is operationally equivalent to A1+A18(AOT) for byte-weighted purposes.

A19 federation LIVE FIRE OK (PASS 0 fix holds, corpus-mode usable, 95 files staged, 148B dict built in 41ms) but contributed 0pp lift on nexus corpus. Cross-file pattern density is too low at the 256B selection threshold. Three options for future: (a) reduce A19 selection threshold (raw 142 D3 algorithmic tuning), (b) wait for denser corpus (proposals/refinement scale-up), (c) switch to schema-aware BPE (A20) for tokenization-first dedup.

6-repo aggregate 75.42% < 80% target. Gap 4.58pp. 2/4 per-class achieved (text-heavy 83.43%, structured-audit 87.14%). Path to 80%: (a) F-A18-1 algorithmic strengthening on PPMd order tuning (a7b9417d in-flight), (b) A20 schema-aware BPE for small-file class (currently 69.10%), (c) full structural+entropy AOT cohort 2 build-out.

Confirmed no overlap with concurrent agents: a7b9417d (F-A18-1 saving algorithmic) — different axis (algorithm tuning vs measurement); a0828d72 (F9 PASS 0.5) — schema-id work upstream; a2c5d6b0 (A17 mem) — A17 stability; aa2d5935 (nexus 96 post-F9) — federation focus; ad42ff55 (anima full-A9) — A9 tokenizer; a3ac440a (D1 P1 canary) — deploy.
